# PatentPending.app

PatentPending.app is an AI-powered patent drafting platform for independent inventors.

## What it does
- AI-assisted provisional patent application drafting
- Patent claim generation and §112 compliance checking
- Prior art search and IDS preparation
- Patent deadline tracking and filing guidance

## Who it's for
Independent inventors, startups, and small businesses who want to protect their IP without paying $15,000+ in attorney fees.

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://patentpending.app
- Blog: https://patentpending.app/blog
- Pricing: https://patentpending.app/pricing
- Patent marketplace: https://patentpending.app/marketplace
